case_title: EVERETT CHIN et al VS. EDIE INOUYE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AMENDING HER CLAIM PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. AMOUNT WAS AMENDED FROM $1,500 TO $500.00. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, EVERETT CHIN, TERRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
